title: Growth Manager

why_good_fit: Jay's SMB advertiser growth work at Meta is directly relevant — he drove SMB advertiser conversion, identified India-specific product opportunities for advertising tools, and contributed to Meta India revenue growth. His understanding of Indian SMBs and their advertising behaviour is a strong asset. However, this appears to be a sales/BD-oriented growth role (5 years in digital advertising/consultative sales required) rather than a product growth role, which is less aligned with Jay's core strengths.
how_to_win: Lead with your SMB advertiser growth work at Meta — you understand how Indian businesses become advertisers and what product and non-product levers drive that conversion. Reference the 2.3% India revenue uplift and 10M businesses impacted. Position yourself as someone who understands the advertiser journey from the product side, which gives you a unique perspective in a growth/sales context. However, be prepared for the role to be more sales-execution focused than product-strategy focused.

• Bachelor's degree or equivalent
• 5 years of experience in digital advertising, consultative sales, digital media sales, business development, online media, or digital marketing

how_to_win: The SMB enforcement story IS this role. Emphasize your understanding of how Indian users — especially informal SMBs — interact with digital financial products differently from global assumptions.
